buildLogs.title: Aero Package V2 Installation
buildLogs.content: Mounted the new Voltex Type 5 GT Wing and custom front splitter. Noticed significant front downforce increase during test runs at Buttonwillow.

buildLogs.title: Turbo Upgrade & Dyno Tune
buildLogs.content: Swapped out the stock FP Green for a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II. Tuned on E85. Reached 580WHP at 28psi. The spool is slightly later but top-end pull is brutal.

buildLogs.title: Engine Assembly
buildLogs.content: Finished assembling the 2.0L with Wiseco pistons and Manley H-beam rods. ACL race bearings all around. Clearances are perfect.

buildLogs.title: Suspension Overhaul
buildLogs.content: Installed KW V3 coilovers and spherical bushings throughout the chassis. Alignment set to -3.0 camber front, -2.5 rear for canyon responsiveness.

buildLogs.title: Exhaust & Intake
buildLogs.content: Fitted the Tomei Titanium exhaust. It's incredibly light but quite loud. Combined with the K&N intake, the VTEC crossover is intoxicating.
